prompt: A photorealistic Japanese classroom interior shot in soft daytime light, viewed from the front-left corner at a slight angle, with an old green chalkboard dominating the wall. On the chalkboard is a large hand-drawn chalk illustration of an anime pirate boy in a wild, joyous pose inspired by Gear 5, with fluffy white cloud-like hair and swirling white smoke around his body, open laughing mouth, white loose jacket and shorts with fluffy trim, a purple sash, one foot thrust toward the viewer and the other leg bent forward, drawn in colored chalk with visible sketch texture. On the right side of the chalkboard, include 2 lines of large chalk text: vertical Japanese characters reading "太陽の神" and below them the English text "GEAR 5". The room should include 1 wooden teacher's desk in the foreground with 1 chalkboard eraser on top, 1 open box of colored chalk, and 3 loose chalk sticks scattered nearby. Add realistic classroom details: a chalk tray running across the board, a left-side window letting in natural light, beige worn walls, a ceiling-mounted fluorescent light, and 1 wall speaker above the board. Make it look like a real photograph of impressive chalkboard fan art in an empty school classroom, clean composition, natural perspective, subtle wear and dust, highly realistic.
translatedPrompt: 一张照片级逼真的日式教室室内镜头，在柔和的日光下拍摄，从左前方以微小角度俯瞰，一面陈旧的绿色黑板占据了墙面。黑板上有一幅大型手绘粉笔画，描绘了一位受 Gear 5 启发、姿态狂野欢快的动漫海盗男孩，他有着蓬松如云朵般的白发，身体周围环绕着旋转的白烟，张嘴大笑，穿着白色宽松夹克和带有毛绒边的短裤，系着紫色腰带，一只脚向观众方向伸出，另一条腿向前弯曲，以彩色粉笔绘制，带有明显的素描质感。在黑板右侧，包含两行大型粉笔字：垂直书写的日文“太阳の神”，下方是英文“GEAR 5”。房间前景应包含 1 张木制教师办公桌，桌上放有 1 个黑板擦、1 盒打开的彩色粉笔和 3 支散落的粉笔。添加逼真的教室细节：横跨黑板的粉笔槽、左侧引入自然光的窗户、米色磨损的墙壁、吸顶荧光灯以及黑板上方 1 个壁挂式扬声器。使其看起来像是一张在空荡的学校教室里拍摄的、令人惊叹的粉笔画同人作品实拍照片，构图整洁，视角自然，带有细微的磨损和灰尘感，高度写实。

breakdown.creativeCore: 日式教室 Gear 5 粉笔画：此提示词可生成一张照片级逼真的空教室场景，特色在于一面大型动漫风格的黑板壁画，非常适合用于同人创作、电影感校园内景或社交媒体对比贴。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic, anime, hand-drawn]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: natural light]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
